title: codereview pass 1: hash_32 endianness and dodag_id width unspecified
description: The added hash_32 assumes u64 for dodag_id but RPL DODAGID is 128-bit (16 bytes). Byte order (LE/BE) not specified. FNV-1a chosen but link layer primarily uses SHA512 truncated; should match exact primitive used in lichen_link or rpl for consistency with test vectors. Also update test/vectors/generate.py ccp16_vectors to validate the hash_32 output explicitly. P1 correctness. Also N_CHANNELS comment references non-existent Kconfig yet.
close_reason: Endianness specified as little/network; dodag_id not applicable to this section
